2603.29466.title: An Isotropic Approach to Efficient Uncertainty Quantification with Gradient Norms
2603.29466.paper_summary: Existing methods for quantifying predictive uncertainty in neural networks are either computationally intractable for large language models or require access to training data that is typically unavailable. We derive a lightweight alternative through two approximations: a first-order Taylor expansion that expresses uncertainty in terms of the gradient of the prediction and the parameter covariance, and an isotropy assumption on the parameter covariance. Together, these yield epistemic uncertainty as the squared gradient norm and aleatoric uncertainty as the Bernoulli variance of the point prediction, from a single forward-backward pass through an unmodified pretrained model. We justify the isotropy assumption by showing that covariance estimates built from non-training data introduce structured distortions that isotropic covariance avoids, and that theoretical results on the spectral properties of large networks support the approximation at scale. Validation against reference Markov Chain Monte Carlo estimates on synthetic problems shows strong correspondence that improves with model size. We then use the estimates to investigate when each uncertainty type carries useful signal for predicting answer correctness in question answering with large language models, revealing a benchmark-dependent divergence: the combined estimate achieves the highest mean AUROC on TruthfulQA, where questions involve genuine conflict between plausible answers, but falls to near chance on TriviaQA's factual recall, suggesting that parameter-level uncertainty captures a fundamentally different signal than self-assessment methods.
2603.29466.paper_summary_zh: 現有的神經網絡預測不確定性量化方法對於大型語言模型要麼計算上不可行，要麼需要訪問通常不可用的訓練數據。我們通過兩個近似推導出一種輕量級的替代方案：一階泰勒展開，將不確定性表達為預測的梯度和參數協方差，及對參數協方差的各向同性假設。這兩者結合起來，將認知不確定性表達為平方梯度範數，將隨機不確定性表達為點預測的伯努利方差，僅需通過未經修改的預訓練模型進行一次前向-反向傳播。我們通過顯示從非訓練數據構建的協方差估計引入的結構性失真是各向同性協方差所避免的，來證明各向同性假設的合理性，並且大型網絡的光譜性質的理論結果支持在規模上的近似。對合成問題的參考馬爾可夫鏈蒙特卡羅估計進行的驗證顯示出強烈的對應關係，隨著模型大小的增長而改善。我們然後利用這些估計來調查每種類型的不確定性在預測問題回答正確性時何時攜帶有用信號，揭示了一個依賴基準的差異：在涉及真實衝突的問題上，結合估計在TruthfulQA上達到最高的平均AUROC，但在TriviaQA的事實回憶中降至接近隨機，這表明參數級不確定性捕獲了與自我評估方法根本不同的信號。
2603.29466.author: Nils Grünefeld et.al.
2603.29466.authors: Nils Grünefeld, Jes Frellsen, Christian Hardmeier
